name: Nora Mill Whole Wheat Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup NORA MILL whole wheat pancake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Add in the buttermilk (or milk) and melted butter.
3. Gradually add the pancake mix, stirring until the dry ingredients are just moistened; leave the batter slightly lumpy.
4. Heat a griddle or large skillet to hot enough that a drop of water sizzles and evaporates quickly on the surface.
5. Pour the batter onto the hot griddle, using about 1/4 cup per pancake.
6. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and edges begin to dry out, then turn once to cook the other side until golden brown.
